title: Extended Gamerules
description: Finely tuned vanilla gamerules. Split overloaded gamerules like `mob_griefing` into groups of rules
body:
# Extended Gamerules

Creepers are too annoying, but `mob_griefing` is too generic?  
With this mod, you can modify gamerules more precisely!

## List of gamerules

> [!NOTE]
> ### Nested rules require their parent to be activated to work
> `/gamerule mob_griefing false` will disable all mob griefing; 
> there is no need to disable every single rule in each category.

---

- `entity_drops`
    - `entity_drops/leash`
    - `entity_drops/hanging` # Paintings, Item Frames
    - `entity_drops/falling_block`
    - `entity_drops/vehicle` # Boats, Minecarts, and their contents

- `forgive_dead_players`
    - `forgive_dead_players/bee`
    - `forgive_dead_players/enderman`
    - `forgive_dead_players/iron_golem`
    - `forgive_dead_players/piglin`
    - `forgive_dead_players/polar_bear`
    - `forgive_dead_players/wolf`
    - `forgive_dead_players/zombified_piglin`

- `mob_griefing`
    - `mob_griefing/creeper_explosion`
    - `mob_griefing/ghast_fireball_explosion`
    - `mob_griefing/wither` # Both collisions and skulls
    - `mob_griefing/can_place_wither_rose`
    - `mob_griefing/ender_dragon`
    - `mob_griefing/enderman_moves_blocks`
    - `mob_griefing/ravager_breaks_plants`
    - `mob_griefing/silverfish_breaks_blocks`
    - `mob_griefing/silverfish_merges_with_stone`
    - `mob_griefing/evoker_wololo`
    - `mob_griefing/breeze_triggers_blocks`
    - `mob_griefing/sheep_eats_grass`
    - `mob_griefing/fox_eats_berries`
    - `mob_griefing/snow_golem_produces_snow_trail`
    - `mob_griefing/rabbit_eats_carrot_crops`
    - `mob_griefing/villager_harvests_farmlands`
    - `mob_griefing/weaving_places_cobwebs`
    - `mob_griefing/can_pickup_items`
        - `mob_griefing/can_pickup_items/villager`
        - `mob_griefing/can_pickup_items/allay`
        - `mob_griefing/can_pickup_items/piglin`
    - `mob_griefing/can_destroy_items`
    - `mob_griefing/can_break_doors`
    - `mob_griefing/can_destroy_hanging_entities` # Paintings, Item Frames
    - `mob_griefing/projectiles_can_interact`
    - `mob_griefing/fireball_starts_fire` # Ghast, Blaze, Dispenser
    - `mob_griefing/vehicle_ignores_explosion`
    - `mob_griefing/can_attack_armor_stands` # Cannot destroy; Goat and Nautilus will no longer target
    - `mob_griefing/can_trample_farmlands`
    - `mob_griefing/can_melt_powder_snow`
    - `mob_griefing/can_trample_turtle_eggs`

- `show_death_messages`
    - `show_death_messages/player`
    - `show_death_messages/pet`

- `spawner_blocks_work`
    - `spawner_blocks_work/monster_spawner`
    - `spawner_blocks_work/trial_spawner`

- `spawn_mobs`
    - `spawn_creatures`
        - `spawn_skeleton_trap`
    - `spawn_ambient`
    - `spawn_axolotls`
    - `spawn_underground_water_creatures`
    - `spawn_water_creatures`
    - `spawn_water_ambient`
